comment:
Hi Nick,
Many thanks for your email. I hope you're OK.
Of course it’s no problem at all to answer your questions about learning foreign languages. Well, learning English isn’t difficult for me because I really enjoy it. That’s why the best way to learn a language is to do things that you like so that learning doesn’t feel like work. As for me, I watch my favourite TV shows in English. In the future, I’d like to learn French because I want to live in Paris.
That’s fantastic news about your sister’s graduation! Where did your sister's graduation take place? How long did it last? Was it exciting?
Email me when you can.
Love,
Vanya

Val.description:
You have received an email message from your English speaking pen-friend Nick:

From: Nick@mail.uk
To: Russian_friend@ege.ru
Subject: Summer

…Today, I've been preparing for my French examination the whole day. Is it difficult for you to learn the English language? What is the best way to learn a foreign language? Would you like to learn any other foreign languages in the future?
My sister graduated from university with a Bachelor's degree yesterday…

Write an email to Nick.
In your message:
- answer his questions;
- ask 3 questions about his sister's graduation
Write 100-140 words.
Remember the rules of email writing.
